# Master of Business Administration

Established 2012

[Faculty](/departments/mba/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To develop competent business leaders with strong ethical values and global perspective.

### Mission

* Provide comprehensive management education with industry focus
* Foster entrepreneurship and innovation in business
* Develop leadership and decision-making skills
* Build strong industry connections for practical exposure

## Programs Offered

### MBA - Master of Business Administration

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Computer Lab
* Finance Lab
* Marketing Lab
* HR Analytics Lab

### Facilities

* Seminar halls
* Conference room
* Library with business journals
* Soft skills lab
* Industry interaction center
